description: editor_update_note_body does not emit editing_session_state_changed event on isDirty transition. REQ-002 item 4 states: 'If this is the first update for this noteId (isDirty transitions false→true), emit an editing_session_state_changed event with status editing and isDirty: true.' The command at editor.rs:715-730 has no AppHandle parameter in its signature — (store: tauri::State<'_, NoteBodyStore>, note_id: String, body: String) — making Tauri event emission impossible. Without the AppHandle, the command cannot call app.emit(). REQ-004 item 5 also requires event emission on transitions, which is precluded by the missing AppHandle.
expected: Command signature should include app: AppHandle parameter. Before setting is_dirty=true, check if it was previously false (transition detection). When a false→true transition is detected, emit editing_session_state_changed with Editing variant and isDirty:true.
